🚲 Generalized Linear Models for Bikes prediction
The project was done as part of the course

at the Paris-Dauphine PSL University. The goal of the project is to determine the best model that predicts/explains the number of bicycle rentals, based on various characteristics of the day (temperature, humidity, wind speed, etc.).
Predicting the number of bikes rented in a bike-sharing system using Generalized Linear Models.
